title: German Glühwein and Kinderpunsch
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"867ht","text":"Glühwein (Mulled wine) is a hot spiced wine beverage which is a traditional drink during the winter in Germany and is served at Christmas markets in Europe. The non-alcoholic version is called \"Kinderpunsch\" which is made with juices instead of wine and is suitable for kids. steps: Please choose between: 1. Glühwein - alcohol containing 2. Kinderpunsch - non-alcoholic
Pour the 1 X, bottle of dry red wine into a medium sized pot.
Add the following ingredients to the pot: 1 X, cinnamon sticks 3 X, whole star anise 5 X, whole cloves 1 X, capsules of Cardamom 1 X, sliced organic orange (with peel) Optional: 1 X, vanilla pod
Turn on the heat and let the wine and spices warm up for about 00:30:00 . IMPORTANT : Do not let the wine boil or you will boil off the alcohol!
Serve hot. Optional garnishes to place in each mug include orange slices, cloves, a star anise or cinnamon stick.
Add the following ingredients to a medium sized pot: 4 cup, orange juice 4 cup, apple juice 1 cup, cherry juice
Add the following ingredients to the pot: 1 X, cinnamon sticks 3 X, whole star anise 5 X, whole cloves 1 X, capsules of Cardamom 1 X, sliced organic orange (with peel) Optional: 1 X, vanilla pod
Turn on the heat and bring the juices and spices mixture to a boil.
Serve hot. Optional garnishes to place in each mug include orange slices, cloves, a star anise or cinnamon stick.
Reduce the heat, cover and simmer for 00:25:00 .
creator: Anita Broellochs
